selection.status_reason: CVX cleared the commercial release thresholds for this market week with a score of 0.325 and high confidence.

reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 3.6% and 20-day momentum is 11.7%.
Trend quality is supported by 80% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 5.8% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 1.2%, downside volatility near 0.9%, and a recent max drawdown of 1.9%.
Volume confirmation is 27.7% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
News signal is bullish with score 0.65, confidence 0.70, and 0.9 weighted articles across 2 sources.
Marketaux entity coverage rated the news flow bullish at 0.65, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 3 articles across 2 sources, 0.9 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.56, average source quality 0.75, confidence 0.70.
Overall model score is 0.325 with high confidence.
